name: ecommerce-microservices
description: Simple E-Commerce Microservices Setup for Learning

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-users" "npm run start-products" "npm run start-orders"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../users-service && npm install && cd ../products-service && npm install && cd ../orders-service && npm install
